author: Eunjae Lee
subject: fix(middleware): subscribe middleware before initializing main index (#4849)
body:
* fix(router): set correct ui state when instance is re-used

* re-create middleware instances on re-start

* update comment

* update mock creator

* replace disposed with state

* fix lint

* fix lint

* fix: subscribe middlewares before mainIndex.init()

* fix lint

* replace runAllMicroTasks() with wait()

* fix mock creator

* do not pass initialUiState to router middleware

* fix snapshot

* update implementation

* fix lint

* add ts-expect-error for better explanation
